units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides the foundational introduction to Apex for database interaction, essential for hands-on learning.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Understanding sObjects is crucial for hands-on Apex development, as it covers how to represent and work with Salesforce data programmatically.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: This unit focuses on hands-on DML operations, directly addressing the 'hands-on Apex' intent by teaching data modification.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: This unit provides practical experience in writing SOQL queries within Apex, a core hands-on skill for data retrieval.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: This unit offers hands-on practice with SOSL queries in Apex, expanding data search capabilities beyond SOQL.
